name: Improper Handling of Inconsistent Special Elements
description: The product does not properly handle cases where special elements in input are inconsistent — such as unbalanced parentheses, mismatched quotes, or conflicting reserved words — leading to undefined parsing behavior or security bypasses.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data with inconsistent special elements (unbalanced pairs, conflicting markers) that flows to TRANSFORM[parser] which does not validate structural consistency, causing undefined behavior without a CONTROL[consistency_check] rejecting malformed input
